description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. For the community's expenses on the synagogue quarter. Dated: 427 AH, which is 1035/36 CE. (A previous PGP entry said 1427 Seleucid = 1115/16 CE.) On verso there are further (related) accounts mainly in Arabic script but with some Judaeo-Arabic at the bottom. These are dated 429 AH, which is 1037/38 CE. Apparently edited in Ora Vaza Molad's MA Thesis, pp. 108–98.
description_he: חשבונות בערבית-יהודית; הוצאות הקהילה לרובע בית הכנסת; 427 לאה (1035/36 לספירה); בגב: חשבונות נוספים בכתב ערבי עם מעט ערבית-יהודית; מתוארכים 429 לאה (1037/38 לספירה)
